chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-4978 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 14.10.2025 Mr. Naseer Ahmed, advocate for KDA Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- This case was last taken up on 13.11.2024, which is almost one year ago. In the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition and the office objections are still outstanding. Today, despite the lapse of one year, none present for the petitioners without any intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
